title.en: Premium Seat Cover Systems for Global Auto Accessory Buyers
title.zh: 面向全球汽配买家的高端座套系统
title.es: Sistemas premium de fundas para compradores globales

sub.en: From universal leather sets to model-specific full-coverage solutions, Kaduosi helps distributors build a sharper automotive interior offer.
sub.zh: 从通用皮革套装到车型定制全包围方案，Kaduosi 帮助经销商打造更高端的汽车内饰产品线。
sub.de: Von universellen Leder-Sets bis zu fahrzeugspezifischen Komplettloesungen.
sub.es: Desde sets universales de cuero hasta soluciones de cobertura completa por modelo.

title.en: Designed for Tesla, BMW, Mercedes-Benz, Toyota and More
title.de: Entwickelt fuer Tesla, BMW, Mercedes-Benz, Toyota und mehr
title.es: Disenado para Tesla, BMW, Mercedes-Benz, Toyota y mas

sub.en: Model-ready patterns, waterproof leather surfaces and all-season comfort for car modification stores and importers.
sub.zh: 车型版型、防水皮革表面与四季舒适体验，适合改装店与进口商主推。
sub.de: Modellgerechte Schnitte, wasserfeste Lederoberflaechen und Komfort fuer jede Saison.
sub.es: Patrones por modelo, cuero impermeable y comodidad para todas las estaciones.

title.en: Low-MOQ Trial Orders, Full-Set Options and Fast Product Expansion
title.zh: 低 MOQ 试单、全套选项与快速扩品能力
title.de: Niedrige MOQ, Komplettsets und schnelle Sortimentserweiterung
title.es: MOQ bajo, sets completos y expansion rapida

sub.en: A catalog built around fast-moving automotive interior upgrades: seat covers, steering wheel covers, cushions, mats and protection accessories.
sub.zh: 围绕高动销汽车内饰升级构建目录：座套、方向盘套、坐垫、脚垫与防护配件。
sub.de: Ein Katalog fuer schnell drehende Innenraum-Upgrades.
sub.es: Un catalogo para mejoras de interior automotriz de alta rotacion.

desc.en: High-end visual language for car owners who want a cleaner, more luxurious cabin upgrade.
desc.zh: 面向追求高级座舱升级的车主，突出干净、豪华、耐用的视觉语言。
desc.de: Hochwertige Optik fuer ein eleganteres Fahrzeuginterieur.
desc.es: Lenguaje visual premium para una cabina mas lujosa.

desc.en: Suitable for model-specific programs including Tesla, BYD, Toyota, BMW and Mercedes-Benz series.
desc.zh: 适合围绕 Tesla、BYD、Toyota、BMW、Mercedes-Benz 等车型开发定制产品线。
desc.de: Geeignet fuer Tesla, BYD, Toyota, BMW und Mercedes-Benz Serien.
desc.es: Apto para programas Tesla, BYD, Toyota, BMW y Mercedes-Benz.

desc.en: Seat covers, cushions, steering wheel covers, sunshades, mats and protection accessories in one sourcing basket.
desc.zh: 座套、坐垫、方向盘套、遮阳、脚垫、防护配件一站式组合采购。
desc.de: Sitzbezuege, Kissen, Lenkradbezuege, Sonnenblenden und Matten.
desc.es: Fundas, cojines, cubrevolantes, parasoles y alfombrillas.

desc.en: Selected customized lines support low trial quantities, while wholesale products scale to set-based orders.
desc.zh: 部分定制系列支持低数量试单，批发产品可扩展到套装订单。
desc.es: Lineas seleccionadas admiten pedidos de prueba bajos.

desc.en: Waterproof, breathable, anti-slip and wear-resistant selling points fit daily driving and family car scenarios.
desc.zh: 防水、透气、防滑、耐磨卖点适合日常通勤与家庭用车场景。

desc.en: A stronger presentation layer for private-label buyers, Amazon sellers and automotive accessory distributors.
desc.zh: 适合私标买家、Amazon 卖家与汽配经销商构建品牌化页面和系列化产品。
desc.es: Para compradores de marca privada, vendedores Amazon y distribuidores.

buyerProfiles.c: Lead with custom-fit leather collections, then add universal full-set covers for faster stock rotation.

buyerProfiles.t: Sell cabin upgrades as a package
buyerProfiles.c: Bundle seat covers with steering wheel covers, cushions and mats to raise average order value.
Start from waterproof, breathable, all-season products with clear model compatibility and lifestyle images.

sop.c: For customized model-specific seat covers, selected SKUs support trial orders from 1 piece or 1 set. For wholesale universal sets, MOQ usually starts from 50-100 sets depending on material and packaging.
Custom-fit covers help buyers avoid loose installation, poor visual finish and customer complaints. Recommend them for premium vehicles and modification stores.
After confirming the main vehicle model, suggest matching steering wheel covers, mats and seat protectors to create a complete interior upgrade package.

contactTitle.en: Build your next automotive interior line
contactTitle.zh: 打造你的下一条汽车内饰产品线
contactTitle.de: Bauen Sie Ihre naechste Auto-Innenraumlinie auf
contactTitle.es: Cree su proxima linea de interiores automotrices

contactSub.en: Send target vehicle models, market, preferred material and order quantity. The Kaduosi team can prepare a quote and sampling plan.
contactSub.zh: 发送目标车型、市场、偏好材质与订单数量，Kaduosi 团队可准备报价与打样方案。
contactSub.de: Senden Sie Fahrzeugmodelle, Markt, Material und Menge.
contactSub.es: Envie modelos, mercado, material preferido y cantidad.
